zh.lifeSummary: 當Muriel de Conteville於1029年出生在法國諾門迪時，她的父親Herluin de Conteville28歲，母親Herleva de Falaise26歲。她於1055年之前與Guillaume de la Ferte-Mace在法國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1070年在英國維爾爾利普利 斯托克享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可素沃爾德聖 艾德蒙達斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Muriel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin ( see Muireall ). Forms of the name are found in Breton as well as in Irish and Scottish Gaelic, and in the form Meriel it was in use in the heart of England in the Middle Ages. The surname Merrill is derived from it. As Muriel it was at first used mainly in Scotland, but became more widely popular during the first half of the 20th century. Since then it has fallen from favour again.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

en.lifeSummary: When Muriel de Conteville was born in 1029, in Normandy, France, her father, Herluin de Conteville, was 28 and her mother, Herleva de Falaise, was 26. She married Guillaume de la Ferte-Mace before 1055, in France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1070, in Limpley Stoke, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 41, and was buried in St Edmund's Church, Southwold, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Muriel de Conteville est née en 1029, à Normandie, France, son père, Herluin de Conteville, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Herleva de Falaise, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume de la Ferte-Mace avant 1055, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1070, à Limpley Stoke, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à St Edmund's Church, Southwold, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Abbey of Bury, St.Edmunds, Suffolk, Engl: St Edmund's Church, Southwold, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Muriel de Conteville 1029 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Herluin de Conteville 28 und ihre Mutter Herleva de Falaise 26. Sie hat vor 1055 in Frankreich Guillaume de la Ferte-Mace geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1070 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Limpley Stoke, Wiltshire, England und wurde in St Edmund's Church, Southwold, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Muriel de Conteville è nata il nel 1029 nel Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Herluin de Conteville, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Herleva de Falaise, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Guillaume de la Ferte-Mace prima del 1055, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1070, nel Limpley Stoke, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a St Edmund's Church, Southwold, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Muriel de Contevilleが1029年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Herluin de Contevilleは28歳，母Herleva de Falaiseは26歳であった。1055年以前にフランスでGuillaume de la Ferte-Maceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1070年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアリンプリー ストクで41歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクソウスウオルドスト エドムンド'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Abbey of Bury, St.Edmunds, Suffolk, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 소우스울드 스트 에드먼드'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Muriel de Conteville(이)가 1029년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Herluin de Conteville(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Herleva de Falaise(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1055년 이전 프랑스에서 Guillaume de la Ferte-Mace(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1070년 영국 윌츠히르 림플리 스토크에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 소우스울드 스트 에드먼드'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Muriel de Conteville nasceu em 1029, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Herluin de Conteville, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Herleva de Falaise, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Guillaume de la Ferte-Mace antes 1055, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1070, em Limpley Stoke, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em St Edmund's Church, Southwold, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Abbey of Bury, St.Edmunds, Suffolk, Engl: St Edmund's Church, Southwold, Suffolk, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.Abbey of Bury, St.Edmunds, Suffolk, Engl: ст эдмунд'с чурч, соутволд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Muriel de Conteville родилась в 1029 г. в местности норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Herluin de Conteville было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Herleva de Falaise, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume de la Ferte-Mace перед 1055 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1070 г. в местности лимпли сток, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности ст эдмунд'с чурч, соутволд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Muriel de Conteville nació en 1029, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Herluin de Conteville, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Herleva de Falaise, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Guillaume de la Ferte-Mace antes de 1055, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1070, en Limpley Stoke, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en St Edmund's Church, Southwold, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
